message:
feat(freeze): Add Zig output language foundation

Added OutputLanguage enum (.zig, .c) to CodeGenOptions with .zig as default.

Implemented:
- Type helpers: jsValueType(), jsContextPtrType(), etc for both languages
- emitFunctionSignature() - generates Zig or C function signatures
- Updated emitHeader() - imports qjs for Zig, includes frozen_runtime.h for C

Status: Header/declarations working, function body emission still needs conversion.

This is foundation for multi-day refactor to make freeze system generate
Zig code instead of C, aligning with our Zig-first architecture.

Next: Convert 3000+ lines of C code emission in emitFunction() to support Zig.
